system.rationale: AF benefit type decisions describe the type of labour-market benefit. Activity support benefit values map to the ontology support type ActivitySupport.
FK benefit group code FK:AS represents activity support and maps to the ontology support type ActivitySupport.
FK payment records include the benefit type connected to the payment. Activity support values map to the ontology support type ActivitySupport.
FK period benefit decisions identify the specific benefit type. Activity support benefit values map to the ontology support type ActivitySupport.
CSN study support cases explicitly describe the type of study support. Grant-like values map to StudyGrant, while loan-like values map to StudyLoan.
CSN grant decision records use grant codes to identify the study-support component. GRUNDB maps to StudyGrant and GRUNDL maps to StudyLoan.
CSN approved amounts are divided by amount type. GRUNDB represents the grant component and maps to StudyGrant, while GRUNDL represents the loan component and maps to StudyLoan.
